### 2026-03-07T16:18Z: User directive
**By:** Jeff Papiez (via Copilot)
**What:** Phase 2 should also support reading QR codes (generated by Spoolman) to link a spool with a printer, in addition to NFC tag scanning/writing.
**Why:** User request — Spoolman generates QR codes for spools; scanning these is a natural complement to NFC for associating spools with printers.
